name: io.github.WillHeadlee/lgl-mcp-server
description: MCP server for Little Green Light CRM. Search donors, log gifts, manage groups and contacts.

environmentVariables.name: LGL_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your Little Green Light API key (Settings → Integration → API Keys)

environmentVariables.name: LGL_READ_ONLY
environmentVariables.description: Set to "true" to refuse all mutating tool calls and hide them from tools/list — including notes and Integration Queue submissions. Strictly read-only: zero writes of any kind. Useful when pointing the server at a live donor database from an exploratory session. Combine with LGL_ASSISTED_MODE=true to selectively re-enable low-risk, human-reviewed writes.

environmentVariables.name: LGL_ASSISTED_MODE
environmentVariables.description: Only meaningful when LGL_READ_ONLY=true is also set. Set to "true" to re-enable a middle permission tier: the automatic access-audit notes, explicit create_note/update_note, and the submit_*_for_review Integration Queue tools (which only post to LGL's human-reviewed queue, never write a record directly). Direct mutations to constituents/gifts/groups/etc. remain blocked.

environmentVariables.name: LGL_INTEGRATION_LISTENER_URL
environmentVariables.description: Listener URL for an LGL custom integration (Settings → Integrations in LGL). Enables the submit_*_for_review tools, which post to LGL's Integration Queue for human approval instead of writing directly. These tools require either full mode or LGL_ASSISTED_MODE=true when LGL_READ_ONLY is set.
